summary: Iteration 166 — Seed Plant Studio (Co-Build Studio) testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (ZARO Guardian lint + regression). Frontend: All UI components verified. CRITICAL: LLM API calls fail due to budget exceeded (external limitation, not code bug).

critical.issue: Returns 500 due to LLM budget exceeded: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.0216552099999996, Max budget: 1.001'. This is an EXTERNAL LIMITATION, not a code bug.

action_items: CRITICAL: Increase LLM budget or wait for budget reset to test full seed-plant conversational flow with Claude Sonnet 4.5
Once budget is available, run full flow tests: TestSeedPlantAPI and TestSeedPlantFullFlow
critical_code_review_comments: ZARO Guardian lint implementation is CORRECT and COMPREHENSIVE - blocks OpenAI secrets (sk-*), Stripe live keys (sk_live_*), AWS keys (AKIA*), GitHub tokens (ghp_*), rm -rf /, curl|sh, path traversal, absolute paths. Warns on sudo and eval().
seed_plant.py routes are correctly implemented: POST /api/seed/plant, POST /api/seed/plant/{sid}/reply, GET /api/seed/plant/{sid}, POST /api/seed/plant/{sid}/finalize
golden_seed.py download endpoint correctly injects generated/{path} artifacts from spec.artifacts into tarball (lines 104-116)

SeedPlantStudio.tsx correctly implements split-view layout with data-testid attributes: seed-plant-studio, seed-plant-thread, seed-plant-preview, seed-plant-name, seed-plant-prompt, seed-plant-start, seed-plant-reply, seed-plant-send, seed-plant-finalize, zaro-pill-{pass|warn|block}
GoldenSeedAdmin.tsx correctly shows 'Plant a seed (Co-Build Studio)' CTA (data-testid='seed-admin-plant-cta') linking to /seed/plant
EchoCommandBar.tsx correctly includes 'plant-a-seed' suggestion with label 'Plant a Seed — grow a custom OS'
App.tsx correctly routes /seed/plant BEFORE /seed (line 387-389, 423-429) to avoid route collision
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter166 introduced Seed Plant Studio (Co-Build Studio) - a conversational seed-to-scaffold flow using Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations. ZARO Guardian lint is fully tested and working (11 unit tests). Regression tests for existing Golden Seed endpoints pass (6 tests). Frontend UI is correctly implemented with all required data-testid attributes. CRITICAL BLOCKER: LLM budget is exceeded, preventing testing of the actual Claude conversation flow. The code implementation appears correct based on code review. Once budget is reset, run TestSeedPlantAPI and TestSeedPlantFullFlow test classes.

frontend_ui: Echo Command Palette includes 'Plant a Seed' suggestion ✓
